creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Wed Mar 13 12:57:45 2013
New Revision: 314081
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314081

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.14
  
  PR:		ports/171917
  Submitted by:	Dan Langille <dan@langille.org> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/databases/mantis/Makefile
  head/databases/mantis/distinfo
  head/databases/mantis/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/mantis/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/mantis/Makefile	Wed Mar 13 12:56:25 2013	(r314080)
+++ head/databases/mantis/Makefile	Wed Mar 13 12:57:45 2013	(r314081)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:   mantis
-# Date created:        6 December 2002
-# Whom:                Sebastien Gioria <gioria@FreeBSD.ORG>
-#
+# Created by: Sebastien Gioria <gioria@FreeBSD.ORG>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	mantis
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.11
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.14
 CATEGORIES=	databases www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}bt/${PORTNAME}-stable/${PORTVERSION}
 DISTNAME=	mantisbt-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -15,7 +11,7 @@ MAINTAINER=	dan@langille.org
 COMMENT=	A bug tracking system written in PHP
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
-USE_MYSQL=	yes
+USE_PSQL=	yes
 USE_PHP=	hash pcre session
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
@@ -25,6 +21,9 @@ do-install:
 	${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR}/
 	${CP} -R ${WRKSRC}/* ${WWWDIR}/
 	${CHOWN} -R ${WWWOWN}:${WWWGRP} ${WWWDIR}/
+	${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR}/docbook/developers/en/build
+	${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR}/docbook/administration_guide/en/build
+	${MKDIR} ${WWWDIR}/docbook/adminguide/en/build
 
 post-install:
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
